subject: Drapion V — a large purple scorpion-like creature with prominent claws raised in an aggressive stance
description: A large, purple armored scorpion-type creature fills the frame with claws raised wide in a threatening display. The body is heavily segmented with a bulky thorax and multiple limbs, rendered in deep purples and dark tones. The background is dark with subtle environmental elements at the edges. The pose is aggressive and confrontational, with the creature facing forward and claws spread outward as if about to strike.
foreground: Large purple armored scorpion creature with raised claws
